feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Datasphere
feed.subtitle: SAP Datasphere Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Data loading from SAP ECC to Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm currently working on DWH and the landscape is SAP ECC EHP8 and Datasphere without BW Bridge (because of transition to S/4HANA in near future).

I need to get data from some tables which is big enough to be replicated or persisted every day. Those tables  have "Creation date" and "Change date" fields, so I added them as remote table and created view to get only new values something like delta by date in datasource. But I found out that function in filter (like "Creation date" = CURRENT_DATE()) isn't pushed to the source system, so Datasphere get all the data from table and filter it inside itself.

I thought about custom datasources and replication flow, but it should have only one date field as delta, and I have 2 of them (because "Change date" can be empty). Another idea is to create in custom FM-based datasource and add it in dataflow. FM will have the next logic: if request contain Creation/Change date - use it, if they are empty - use current date.

Maybe there is more elegant way to solve this issue?

entry.title: Error in Replication Flow in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an error while replicating data from S4 HANA Public Cloud to SAP Datasphere for master data cds via replication flow. Attaching the error screenshot.

 

Note: The DSP tenant is freshly setup so it could be something to do with the connection as well, But we have a communication scenario,Arrangment and User in Place.

entry.title: Unable to open ABAP_CDS through import remote table option
entry.content:
Hello Team,

While trying to import remote table ABAP_CDS from my QA system it does not expand and show me the CDS views.

As seen in the below screen shot, it just goes to loading. FYI.. i am able to open BW and SAP extractors without any issue. Till yesterday I was able to open without any issues.

SAP Datasphere

entry.title: The meaning of associations dimensions in the AM model
entry.content:
Hello, 

The AM model I am trying to consume via OData contains multiple of the same dimension.
ex) CO_AREA →  0CO_AREA∞D19, 0CO_AREA∞D20, 0CO_AREA∞D21

What does "∞" mean?
How can I check where each dimension is coming from?

entry.title: Account mapping tool for group consolidation
entry.content:
Hi all,

At the group level, we are transitioning to SAP S/4HANA and need to set up a process for group reporting/consolidation (in BCS). This involves in our architecture a pre-stage in Datasphere collecting financial data from all sub-brands, which currently operate on various ERPs. While the integrations and data extraction from the brands are being developed in Datasphere, we still need an account mapping tool to align the sub-brands' accounts with the parent/group accounts.

One idea is to build this functionality directly in Datasphere, but I'm unsure if that's the best approach. Does anyone have experience with a working setup for account mapping in Datasphere (DSP) or recommendations for specific modules or tools that could handle this?

entry.title: SAP Datasphere - Replication Flow - Initial - Downtime
entry.content: During the execution of a Datapshere Replication Flow of Load Type Initial, must all activity in S/4HANA cease? Is this concept similar to filling the Setup Table of the LIS extractors for BW?

entry.title: BTP application writing to on-premise HANA database table / Datasphere HANA database table
entry.content:
Hello,

We have some BTP developers creating an app that would write to an on-premise HANA database table (this database is used in for BW/4HANA).

We eventually want to migrate the BTP app to write to a Datasphere table. 

Is there a connection framework where we can easily switch the BTP app from writing to the on-premise HANA database table to writing to the Datasphere table?

Thanks.

Regards,

Mel Calucin

entry.title: Access the HANA database attached to a S/4HANA on-cloud
entry.content:
I know that we can access the HANA database attached to a S/4HANA on-premise, but is it possible to access the HANA database attached to a S/4HANA on-cloud?

Would there be a difference between the Private and Public Editions of S/4HANA on-cloud

We want to connect Datasphere to the HANA database on a S/4HANA on-cloud.

Thanks.

Regards,

Mel Calucin

entry.title: Analytic Model was created with older version of the editor
entry.content:
After last update of SAP Datasphere one of our Analytic Model is break

We receive the message : Analytic Model was created with older version of the editor. Delete and recreate the Analytic Model.

It's impossible to edit the Analytic Model, we can't restore a copy of our JSON file exported before the transport in production

After investigation, we think it is caused due special characters in the technical name

When we try to redeploy the model, we see the message below in the log.

Review the following warnings: Column(s) (/BIC/C_AIE_143) of entity "SPACE001.VG_ISU_DEVICE" contains one or more of (/, \, ", .) character(s) and the same are replaced in the analytical model.

Some fields that are used start by  /BIC/.. these fields are come from BW infoObject or ADSO and worked fine before the update.

Only one solution rebuilt a big Analytic Model 😞

It is therefore noticed that SAP unilaterally changes the functioning of its application without taking into account that there are customers behind the application.

entry.title: View cannot be deployed with changed metadata
entry.content:
Hi

Could you help me with the following case?, when trying to replicate a view the message is displayed: The remote table cannot be deployed with changed metadata as the replication is in active or error state

I already tried to remove the replicated data and replicated it again from the Monitor and the Data builder.

Best regards

entry.title: Datasphere oData service parameter values ​​dynamically?
entry.content: In SAP Datasphere, within a data flow connected to an oData service, is it possible to send parameter values ​​dynamically? If possible, how is this done?

entry.title: Datasphere Internal error: SQL View - Resource governor for 'cursors' exceeded
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have define an SQL View which uses a few local table variables to split up the logic and returns a union of these temporary tables.

Whenever I attempt to preview the result, I run into the following error:

internal error: Error opening the cursor for the remote database <DWC_BWBRIDGESPACE.BWBRIDGE> [SAP AG][LIBODBCHDB SO][HDBODBC] General error;403 internal error: An error occurred while opening the cursor for the remote database. The server name: "DWCHDL2" [SAP][ODBC Driver][SAP HANA Cloud, data lake Relational Engine]Resource governor for 'cursors' exceededThe problematic query: "SELECT

If return each of table variables on their own, the error doesn't appear and I can preview the data just fine.How can I debug this further? Is there a parameter I can check to see where the issue may be coming from?

entry.title: Datasphere: Table Function - Union with Tuple instead of a Table
entry.content:
Hello, 

I'm creating a SQL-based View in Datasphere. I have a requirement to create multiple versions from the same record I'm looping over. I have inititalized a table variable to hold my result and have created a cursor over my source table. Based on each iteration, I manually create the tuple that I would like to insert as my new record. The issue that I'm facing is appending to my result table. I want to overwrite my result table as the union of itself with the new record, but the syntax check fails as a "from" clause is expected implying that I have to use a table. I know that what I'm trying to achieve is possible on other DBs and SQL flavors but cannot seem to find the equivalent on HANA. Any ideas? I have attached a screenshot of the code snippet.

Thanks!

entry.title: Consuming data from an Analytical Model
entry.content:
Hello experts - 

I’m looking for options to save data in Datasphere by running an analytical model at specific times during the day. However, it seems that Data Flow doesn’t support AM as a source. Are there any alternative approaches?

Thanks,

Hiri

entry.title: environment variables In SAP Datasphere
entry.content: In SAP Datasphere, are there environment variables? What are they? How can I use them?

entry.title: Reconciliation of Data Between SAP and Databricks via SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello  , we’re integrating SAP data (via BW and SAP DI) into Databricks, but we often struggle with data reconciliation and alignment between the two platforms. Has anyone used SAP Datasphere to streamline this process and ensure consistent, accurate data across SAP and Databricks? We’d appreciate any insights, best practices, or lessons learned on how SAP Datasphere can help resolve these challenges and improve data integrity in such a hybrid environment.

 

Thanks.

entry.title: SAP DATASPHERE: DYNAMIC FILTER TO START ON FIRST DAY OF THE YEAR
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working with creating a dynamic filter from a graphic view in SAP Datasphere for a data extraction from a remote table that contains 20 million records from the source system.  I would like to apply a date filter to only extract into Datasphere the previous two years plus current to omit from extracting in the 20 million records.  

Currently I have a manual date filter of POST_DATE BETWEEN '20230101' AND '99991231'.  I would like to apply a dynamic filter so I won't have to change the dates manually each year.  I also need the date function of the filter to start on the first day of the previous two years. 

I tried subtracting the 2 years from the current date function but then the filter will start two years back based on current date.  Example:  20230212.  I need the date to be 20230101

Then for when the year switches to 2026 then the date range of the dynamic filter will be '20240101' AND '99991231'

If anyone can provide assistance that would be great. 

Thank you

entry.title: Cannot use custom CDS view on datasphere replication flow
entry.content:
Hello.

I've created a custom CDS view (a copy paste from the standard CDS C_SALESCHANGEDOCITEMDEX):

However, when trying to use this CDS on a replication flow, is failling (with no details on the error):

When the replication flow uses the standard CDS view (C_SALESCHANGEDOCITEMDEX), there is no errors:

No errors on ST22 or autorization problems on SU53.

Thanks in advance for any help.

entry.title: How to make one file from multiple parquet files in datasphere replication flow
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I hope this message finds you well.
I am reaching out regarding the replication flow in SAP Datasphere, which is generating multiple Parquet files (20 in my case) in the ADLS target source due to large number of records in source.

Could you kindly advise on how to consolidate these generated Parquet files into a single file containing all the data? Additionally, how we can increase file size to optimize number of generated files?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.
Best regards,
Arvind

entry.title: Datasphere trial - domain not trusted
entry.content: While trying to access the Datasphere trial I get this error
